title: Ground System Components
chapter_title: Ground Data Systems and Mission Operations

data.Type of Product: Antennas for small satellites in and S, X and Ka-band frequencies
USRP X410, up to 7.2 GHz with RFSOC advanced FPGA and meeting wide bandwidth requirements. USRP X310: DC-6 GHz with up to 160 MHz of baseband bandwidth, multiple high-speed interfaces
Cortex CRT (low data rate) and HDR (high data rate (previously by Zodiac)

data.Product: Modem, for TT&C and Payload Reception
data.Type of Product: Satcore, plug-and-play modem for TT&C and Payload Reception
SpectralNet: Digital IF product that converts analog signals at RF frequencies up to S-band into digital IF packets.
A USB low-power board to simulate ground station in laboratory conditions. The USB dongle integrates both a low-power UHF transceiver and a TNC, thus miniaturizing common ground station rack systems

data.Product: Integrated Testing Systems (EGSE) & Ground Station TT&C Modems
